title: Audi enthusiast upgrades 2001 A4 gear shift with old smartwatch in 3D-printed housing vide-coded WearOS app displays gear selection, can be used to control in-car media
summary: An Audi enthusiast upgraded his 2001 A4's gear shift with an old smartwatch, creating an interactive display. The watch is housed in a custom 3D-printed case and controlled through a WearOS app. The app also allows in-car media control.
insight: Repurposing technology fosters resourcefulness and innovative solutions in automotive customization.

title: New Flipper One computing multitool bristles with network, GPIO, and M.2 connectivity new keychain device is also a fully open Arm Linux computer
summary: The Flipper One is a new, compact computing multitool with network and GPIO capabilities. It also features M.2 connectivity and a fully open Arm Linux computer. The device is designed for geeks and enthusiasts.
insight: Rugged, open-source computing in the palm of your hand

title: Intel leans on LPDDR5X to dodge global HBM crisis, leaked Crescent Island AI GPU pics reveal massive Xe3P core chip sidesteps HBM shortage with 160GB of cheaper memory
summary: Intel's Crescent Island GPU uses 20 LPDDR5X modules instead of HBM, avoiding the memory shortage.
insight: Intel sidesteps HBM shortage with cost-effective LPDDR5X memory solution

title: ASML CEO says Elon Musk is 'very serious' about TeraFab chipmaking megaproject, confirms direct talks Musk targets $119 billion Texas semiconductor facility
summary: ASML CEO confirms direct talks with Elon Musk on TeraFab chip project, which entails a $119 billion Texas semiconductor facility.
insight: Musk's investment could disrupt global chip manufacturing landscape significantly.

title: China's new homegrown gaming GPU flops in performance and price flagship $485 LX 7G100 can't keep pace with Nvidia's older RTX 4060
summary: Lisuan Tech's LX 7G100 gaming GPU faces criticism from Chinese media for poor performance and high price, struggling to keep up with Nvidia's RTX 4060. The graphics card, priced at $485, has gone up for preorder. Reviews from Chinese outlets highlight its shortcomings in comparison to established competitors.
insight: New Chinese gaming GPU lags behind established Nvidia models significantly

title: Angry tiny Texas town council member proposes total ban on cellular and GPS devices in protest over AI dispute says 'Let s take Bandera back to 1880' after town votes to dump AI-powered license plate reader
summary: A Texas town councilor proposes a ban on cellular and GPS devices after a vote to remove AI-powered license plate readers. The proposal aims to take the town back to the 1880s. This move is seen as a protest against the technology.
insight: Fear of AI and government surveillance drives resistance in small towns.

title: Korean funeral services company lost $33 million of its customers' money over a bad crypto bet firm was secretly investing client funds into leveraged crypto ETFs
summary: Bumo Sarang, a Korean funeral services company, lost $33 million after investing $40 million of client funds into a leveraged crypto ETF. This exploitation of loopholes to siphon funds into high-risk investments is a widespread issue in the industry. Almost half of the industry is involved in similar practices.
insight: Lack of regulation enables widespread exploitation of client funds.

title: AMD Ryzen AI Max 400 Gorgon Halo packs up to 192GB of unified memory refreshed APU uses Zen 5 and RDNA 3.5, and can clock up to 5.2 GHz
summary: AMD introduces Ryzen AI Max 400 Gorgon Halo series with up to 192GB unified memory. These refreshed APUs utilize Zen 5 and RDNA 3.5 architectures, reaching clock speeds of 5.2 GHz. The Ryzen AI Halo development box, featuring last-gen Strix Halo chips, will be available for pre-order in June for $3,999.
insight: Groundbreaking unified memory and performance elevate AI-focused computing experience

title: Memory makers brace for hydrogen fluoride pricing shock as Hormuz blockade impacts supply chain key etching and cleaning material faces sharp cost increase amid trade disruption
summary: Hydrogen fluoride prices may rise due to supply chain disruptions, affecting memory products.
insight: Price shock threatens global memory and storage product supply chain stability.

title: Ryzen 7 5800X3D AM4 10th Anniversary Edition surfaces online for $310 return of iconic gaming CPU for budget builders seems imminent
summary: AMD's Ryzen 7 5800X3D AM4 10th Anniversary Edition CPU listed for $310, a budget-friendly option for gaming builders.
insight: Iconic gaming CPU returns to budget market, affordable gaming options increase.

title: Team Group agrees to $1.1 million DRAM settlement in another false advertising lawsuit claimed advertised memory speeds required BIOS tweaks and overclocking settings
summary: Team Group settles $1.1 million lawsuit over false RAM advertising claims. The company denies wrongdoing but agreed to the settlement. The lawsuit alleged that advertised memory speeds required BIOS tweaks and overclocking settings.
insight: Companies may face lawsuits over exaggerated RAM performance claims.

title: Get a 2TB Western Digital Black SN7100 SSD for only $299.99 $200 savings drives snappy PCIe 4.0 M.2 SSD down to a more reasonable price point.
summary: Newegg has discounted the 2TB WD Black SN7100 PCIe 4.0 SSD to $299.99, offering strong performance and lower power consumption for PS5 and PC users. This deal makes it an attractive option at this price point. The DRAM-less drive provides efficient storage.
insight: Cost-effective high-performance storage option for gaming PCs and consoles

title: Samsung and SK Hynix employees are reportedly abandoning overseas training programs to nab up to $400,000 performance bonuses online dating grades rise as female members 'seeking out SK hynix employees'
summary: Samsung and SK Hynix employees are considering abandoning training programs for performance bonuses, driven by AI-led semiconductor profits and record bonus projections.
insight: Semiconductor profits fuel employee loyalty crisis over performance bonuses.

title: Russia's Sberbank wants Chinese chips for its GigaChat AI in the face of Western sanctions faces a long wait behind ByteDance and Alibaba
summary: Sberbank seeks Chinese chips for its GigaChat AI, potentially Huawei's Ascend 950, as a response to Western sanctions.
insight: Russian banks turn to Chinese tech amid escalating Western sanctions tensions.

title: HyperX FlipCast Review: For the gamer-podcaster
summary: The HyperX FlipCast microphone offers professional-quality sound and versatile connectivity options. With its end-address design, on-mic controls, and affordable price point, it's an attractive choice for gamers and podcasters. However, its $230 price tag may be a barrier for some users.
insight: Balancing quality, features, and affordability for content creators matters.

title: Asus ZenScreen Duo OLED (MQ149CD) Review: An impressive, book-style dual-screen portable monitor
summary: The Asus ZenScreen Duo OLED (MQ149CD) is a portable dual-screen monitor designed for mobile professionals. Its book-style design allows for versatility and convenience. This device offers a compact solution for multitasking on the go.
insight: Enhanced productivity through dual-screen flexibility for mobile workers.

title: Intel kicks off development on next-decade 10A and 7A process technologies 14A node remains on track for critical October PDK release
summary: Intel is on track to release its 14A process technology in 2029, with 10A and 7A following in the 2030s. The company has kicked off development on these next-generation process technologies. High-volume manufacturing is expected to begin in 2029 and 2030 respectively.
insight: Advancements in microprocessor technology boost computing performance and efficiency.

title: China banned Nvidia 5090D V2 while CEO Jensen Huang was in town, report claims move comes as Beijing pushes its AI tech companies to use homegrown chips
summary: China banned the Nvidia RTX 5090D V2 GPU due to US export restrictions. The GPU was designed for gaming and AI development. The move pushes Beijing to rely on homegrown AI chips.
insight: Nvidia's compliance with US export controls backfires in China market.

title: Flipper One A Rockchip RK3576-powered portable Arm Linux computer and networking multi-tool
summary: The Flipper One is a portable Arm Linux computer and networking multi-tool, featuring a Rockchip RK3576 SoC and dual Gigabit Ethernet, Wi-Fi 6E, and optional 5G or 4G LTE modem support.
insight: Redefining wireless hacking and networking with open-source hardware and mainline Linux kernel support.

title: Procolored X one A 3-in-1 laser engraver with UV and UV-DTF color printing (Crowdfunding)
summary: The Procolored X one is a 3-in-1 machine combining UV printing, dual-laser engraving, and UV-DTF sticker making, simplifying workflows for small businesses and DIY makers. It features a compact, enclosed design with a unique X-axis dual-track system. The machine boasts improved print efficiency and speed.
insight: Streamlined multi-functionality boosts efficiency for small businesses and DIY makers

title: Coralboard features Synaptics Astra SL2619 Edge AI SoC, supports Google Gemma 3 inference
summary: The Coralboard development board features the Synaptics Astra SL2619 Edge AI SoC with 1 TOPS Synaptics Torq inference engine, supporting Google Gemma 3 inference. It offers 2GB of RAM, MIPI camera and display interfaces, and expansion connectors. The board is ideal for AI applications and edge computing projects.
insight: Accelerates Edge AI with high-performance inference capabilities integrated.

title: Hacknect A wireless hacking USB cable with a built-in microSD card slot (Crowdfunding)
summary: Hacknect is a wireless hacking USB cable with a microSD card slot, controlled via Wi-Fi or Bluetooth, designed for makers, developers, and cybersecurity researchers.
insight: Concealed hacking tool raises concerns about secure data exchange and device safety.

title: ADI buys Empower for $1.5B and then reports record 2Q bookings
summary: ADI has acquired Empower for $1.5B, expanding its manufacturing and customer base. Empower's FinFast technology integrates IVRs with AI systems, bringing them closer to processor hardware. This acquisition has led to record 2Q bookings for ADI.
insight: AI processing gets a significant boost with ADI-Empower integration.

title: A Lord of the Rings open-world RPG is coming from the Kingdom Come: Deliverance studio
summary: Warhorse Studios is developing a Lord of the Rings open-world RPG. The studio confirmed rumors of the project in a recent post. Details are scarce, but more information will be revealed in time.
insight: Kingdom Come: Deliverance studio brings open-world expertise to Middle-earth

title: Nvidia hits record $81.6 billion revenue as AI boom shows no sign of slowing
summary: Nvidia achieves record $81.6 billion revenue, driven by the AI boom. Data centers are being rapidly built, with CEO Jensen Huang calling it the largest infrastructure expansion in human history. The expansion is accelerating at an extraordinary speed.
insight: AI infrastructure growth is transforming industries at unprecedented speed.

title: Google is remaking Search in ChatGPT's image
summary: Google is remaking Search in the image of ChatGPT, despite reliability concerns.
insight: Google's AI-driven Search may fundamentally alter user information experience

title: ASML says first silicon from its latest $400M High-NA EUV machines is just months away
summary: ASML's latest $400M chipmaking machines will deliver first silicon products soon.
insight: Advancements in chip manufacturing drive long-term cost and efficiency benefits.

title: Redditor creates ungodly gaming PC with 13 internal screens and 15,000 looping GIFs
summary: Redditor Several-Bar-6512 built a gaming PC with 13 internal screens and 15,000 looping GIFs.
insight: Unconventional design challenges traditional gaming PC expectations and boundaries.

title: Herman Miller's new Coyl gaming desk starts at $1,095
summary: Herman Miller's Coyl gaming desk is customizable with various colors and leg options, offering a tailored experience. The desk comes with a red power cable and cable tray for cable management. Starting price is $1,095.
insight: Gaming desks are becoming a key focus for high-end interior design.

title: Sony cuts prices on flagship WH-1000XM6 and XM5 headphones
summary: Sony's WH-1000XM6 and XM5 headphones are discounted to $400 and $250. The WH-1000XM6 and XM5 remain top ANC options for strong audio and long battery life. The price cuts follow the debut of the 1000X The ColleXion lineup.
insight: High-end headphones become more affordable for consumers suddenly

title: Jeff Bezos isn't worried about the AI bubble: "the good ideas will pay for all of the losers"
summary: Jeff Bezos dismisses AI bubble fears, citing accelerated technological progress.
insight: Speculative excess can drive technological progress, outweighing potential losses.

title: Microsoft is pulling the plug on SMS codes, wants you to switch to passkeys
summary: Microsoft is phasing out SMS-based authentication for personal accounts, citing security concerns.
insight: SMS codes are no longer secure, replaced by stronger alternatives.

title: CrystalDiskInfo update adds fake Samsung SSD detection
summary: CrystalDiskInfo 9.9.0 adds a feature to detect counterfeit Samsung SSDs by analyzing hardware and firmware data.
insight: Counterfeit Samsung SSDs are becoming increasingly convincing and harder to spot.

title: Kickstarter is walking back mature content rules after backlash
summary: Kickstarter is revising its rules on mature content after backlash from creators.
insight: Unclear rules harm creators and undermine platform trustworthiness.

title: Researchers hit 112Gbps over wireless in a breakthrough that could shape 6G
summary: Researchers achieved 112Gbps wireless communication, surpassing 420GHz, a new frontier in high-frequency wireless communications, potentially paving the way for 6G cellular networks.
insight: Enabling ultra-high-speed, low-latency wireless networks for future 6G applications.

title: A Broken Sword movie adaptation is coming from the studio behind Sonic the Hedgehog
summary: A Broken Sword movie adaptation is in the works, based on the 1996 point-and-click game. The project comes from the studio behind Sonic the Hedgehog, suggesting a potential shift in tone. Fans of the original game can expect a new interpretation.
insight: A beloved classic gets a Hollywood makeover with potential mixed results.

title: Microsoft refreshes Surface with Panther Lake and up to 64GB of RAM, starting at $1,500
summary: Microsoft has launched new Surface for Business laptops with Panther Lake processors, up to 64GB of RAM, and starting at $1,500. Orders are now open for two new laptops and a 2-in-1, with more models to follow later this year.
insight: Microsoft responds to business demand with upgraded Surface laptops and 2-in-1

title: Google takes on OpenClaw with Gemini Spark, a 24/7 AI agent for your digital life
summary: Google introduces Gemini Spark, a 24/7 AI agent for digital life, helping users navigate and automate tasks.
insight: Revolutionizing personal AI assistance in daily life with seamless automation.
